description_long: This sconce features a spherical, amber-tinted glass or acrylic shade that forms the main body, giving it a warm and inviting appearance. The top of the sphere is capped with a flat, dark-colored (likely black or dark brown) circular fixture, which serves as the mounting base and possibly houses the electrical components. A slender, vertical rod or cord extends from the center of the cap, indicating that the sconce is designed to be suspended from above, such as from a ceiling. The surface of the globe is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and enhancing its visual appeal. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and a focus on geometric form. There are no visible decorative motifs or embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, spherical amber sconce with a glossy finish, suspended from a dark circular cap and slender cord. Its minimalist design features smooth surfaces and clean lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full round amber globe and the dark circular cap with the suspension cord centered above.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the spherical body and cap visible, highlighting the uniformity of the design.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with the same spherical shape and cap, no additional features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, maintaining the consistent spherical and cap design.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a minimalist, modern design with a smooth amber globe and a simple dark cap, emphasizing geometric simplicity and clean lines.
